name: mineflayer-mcp-server
description: MCP server for AI agents controlling Minecraft bots

scripts.dev: tsc --watch | while IFS= read -r line; do echo "$line"; case "$line" in *'Found 0 errors'*) kill -USR1 $(pgrep -f 'node.*dist/index.js') 2>/dev/null && echo '[dev] Sent SIGUSR1 → tools/list_changed' ;; esac; done
